case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI PRESENT: Mr. Justice Aqeel Ahmed Abbasi, CJ Mr. Justice Abdul Mobeen Lakho, J C.P. No.D-1398 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE: 1. For order on CMA No.6463/2024 (Urgent). 2. For order on office objection Nos.2 & 26. 3. For order on CMA No.6464/2024 (Exemption). 4. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 20th March 2024 Petitioner Waheed Khan present in person. -*-*-*-*-*- 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. After hearing the matter at some length, it appears that the petitioner after having retired from his service intends to get his age corrected in the educational and other documents, whereas, prima facie, for such purpose petitioner is required to seek declaration from the competent forum/Court of civil jurisdiction. While confronted with hereinabove position, petitioner appearing in person does not press instant petition and submits that he will approach the relevant forum/Court for redressal of his grievance. Accordingly, instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
